message:
feat(demo): add mouse support to Accessibility Panel and Drag & Drop screens

Accessibility Panel: click toggles (high contrast, reduced motion, large text)
via row-mapped hit regions. Drag & Drop: click to select items in lists,
scroll to navigate, right-click to reorder (sortable) or transfer (cross-container),
click mode tabs to switch demo modes. Adds 11 new mouse interaction tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
